description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `mkdir .public`, `cp -r * .public`, and `mv .public public`, then publishes the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact. In the default test stage add a sast job that allows failure, uses the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, runs `export SP_VERSION=$(echo \"$CI_SERVER_VERSION\" | sed 's/^\\([0-9]*\\)\\.\\([0-9]*\\).*/\\1-\\2-stable/')` followed by `docker run --env SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL=\"${SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL:-3}\" --volume \"$PWD:/code\" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \"registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/sast:$SP_VERSION\" /app/bin/run /code`, and stores `gl-sast-report.json` as an artifact.
